title: ILIKE clauses don't work on certain characters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, description) VALUES ('hello', NULL), ('hëllo', NULL), ('hÄllo', NULL), (NULL, NULL);
CREATE TABLE related_table (test_id INT REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE name ILIKE '%ë%';
key_bug_features: ILIKE clause fails with specific special characters
